title: Subscribe for updates: FluWatch+ surveillance - Canada.ca
content:
## Subscribe for updates: FluWatch+ surveillance
- Subscribe to FluWatch+ surveillance
- Change your FluWatch+ surveillance subscription
- Unsubscribe to FluWatch+ surveillance

## Subscribe to FluWatch+ surveillance
To be notified when new Canadian respiratory virus surveillance reports are published each week, enter your email address below and click on the " Subscribe " button.
Required fields are marked with an asterisk ( * ).

## Change your  FluWatch+ surveillance subscription
Changing your FluWatch+ surveillance subscription e-mail requires unsubscribing under the previous e-mail address and re-subscribing with your new e-mail address.

## Unsubscribe to  FluWatch+ surveillance
If you are already a subscriber and wish to unsubscribe, type in your e-mail address in the box below and select the " Unsubscribe " button.
